name: Agfachrome Expired
description: The full name for this recipe should be “Expired Agfachrome Slide” as it’s modeled after photos shot on expired color reversal films like Agfachrome 100 RS, RSX II, and CT100. Rather than letting magenta tones overpower the entire image (as often happens with poorly stored slide film), I aimed for a more balanced and warmer color scheme, reminiscent of images taken at sunrise or sunset.
author: Mihai Serban
